description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, brown hip roof and white exterior walls. The structure features a prominent garage on one end, with a driveway leading up to it, and a small covered entryway. The building sits on a rectangular plot with a green lawn and a black base, suggesting a foundation or raised platform. Windows are arranged in a linear fashion along the longer sides, with the front facade displaying a symmetrical set of windows and a central door. The roof has a simple chimney and overhangs that provide shade to the windows and entry. The overall design is practical and typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a brown hip roof, attached garage, and symmetrical front windows, set on a rectangular green lawn.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade with three windows, the main entrance, and the attached garage on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the garage door, driveway, and the hip roof's slope towards the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying a plain wall with minimal windows and the rear lawn area.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, the hip roof, and a small window.
